query:
SELECT 
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[105]') as matchup105,
  JSON_EXTRACT(payload, '$.schedule[106]') as matchup106
FROM espn_season_cache 
WHERE season = 2024 AND viewName = 'combined';
